---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement
title: '[Feature] '
labels: enhancement
assignees: ''
---

## Problem Statement

Describe the problem or limitation you're running into. e.g. "I find it difficult to..."

## Proposed Solution

Describe what you'd like to happen. Be as specific as possible.

## Alternatives Considered

Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered.

## Additional Context

Any mockups, examples from other tools, or related issues.
